accepted_ascii_heavy_rows.source: You can export some or all of the Katana scene to a RenderMan RIB file from within the Node Graph pane. Right-click any node to open the context menu, select the Debug menu, then choose “Open prman .rib Output in External Editor.” RfK builds the scene up to that node, writes it to a RIB file, and Katana opens it in the external text editor set in your
accepted_ascii_heavy_rows.translation: 你可以在 Node Graph 面板中，将 Katana scene 的一部分或全部导出为 RenderMan RIB 文件。右键单击任意 node 打开 context menu，选择 Debug menu，然后选择 “Open prman .rib Output in External Editor”。RfK 会构建截至该 node 的 scene，将其写入 RIB 文件，并让 Katana 在你的

accepted_ascii_heavy_rows.source: This Debug RIB Output will match the disk render version of the scene.
accepted_ascii_heavy_rows.translation: 这个 Debug RIB Output 会与该 scene 的 disk render 版本匹配。

accepted_ascii_heavy_rows.source: To check a scene's state for live renders, there is a PrmanGlobalStatements option that will write out a RIB before any render. The option is in the plugin section under “Debug”: plugin->Debug->debugRibFile.
accepted_ascii_heavy_rows.translation: 要检查 live renders 的 scene state，可以使用一个 PrmanGlobalStatements option，让它在任何 render 前写出 RIB。该 option 位于 “Debug” 下的 plugin section：plugin->Debug->debugRibFile。
